affine.title: Affine cancellation regime sweep
affine.description: Reuses the two-branch affine topology while increasing the right-branch cancellation weight from one-path parity to full left-minus-right cancellation.
affine.sweepDimension: cancellation weight on the right branch

routed.title: Routed dual-activation regime sweep
routed.description: Reuses the four-expert routed topology while increasing the y-axis contribution weight from single-expert parity to full dual-axis dependence.
routed.sweepDimension: dual-activation weight on the y-axis contribution
